The '''Type-12B Hollow-Tip Rocket''',<ref name="AE" /> also known as '''Type-12B capsules'''<ref name="GG10" /> and '''Type-12B rockets''', was an ammunition type manufactured by [[Locris Syndicates/Legends|Locris Syndicates]]<ref name="EGWT" /> and [[Locris Syndicated Securities/Legends|Locris Syndicated Securities]].A hollow-tip rocket,<ref name="AE" /> Type-12B rockets were typically loaded with [[FGA-583 nerve agent]], although other compounds could be used<ref name="GG10" /> such as [[Accudrop Stun Gas]].<ref name="AE" /> Some [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] were known to "hot load" their rockets with exotic [[Poison/Legends|poisons]].<ref name="GG10" />

The Type-12B was designed for use with [[Locris Syndicates/Legends|Locris Syndicates']] [[Model RDP-12 Rocket Launcher]].<ref name="GG10" /> They were also compatiable with [[Kelvarek Consolidated Arms/Legends|Kelvarek Consolidated Arms']] [[MM9 mini concussion rocket launcher/Legends|MM9 rocket system]].<ref name="EGWT" />
